original_query: select   i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  ,stddev_samp(ss_net_profit) as store_sales_profit  ,stddev_samp(sr_net_loss) as store_returns_loss  ,stddev_samp(cs_net_profit) as catalog_sales_profit  from  store_sales  ,store_returns  ,catalog_sales  ,date_dim d1  ,date_dim d2  ,date_dim d3  ,store  ,item  where  d1.d_moy = 4  and d1.d_year = 2001  and d1.d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk  and i_item_sk = ss_item_sk  and s_store_sk = ss_store_sk  and ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk  and ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk  and ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number  and sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk  and d2.d_moy               between 4 and  4 + 2  and d2.d_year              = 2001  and sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk  and sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk  and cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk  and d3.d_moy               between 4 and  4 + 2  and d3.d_year              = 2001  group by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  order by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_sales_dates AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 2001 AND d_moy = 4
),
filtered_return_catalog_dates AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 2001 AND d_moy BETWEEN 4 AND 6
)
SELECT i_item_id,
       i_item_desc,
       s_store_id,
       s_store_name,
       stddev_samp(ss_net_profit) AS store_sales_profit,
       stddev_samp(sr_net_loss) AS store_returns_loss,
       stddev_samp(cs_net_profit) AS catalog_sales_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN filtered_sales_dates d1 ON d1.d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk
JOIN item ON i_item_sk = ss_item_sk
JOIN store ON s_store_sk = ss_store_sk
JOIN store_returns ON ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk
                   AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk
                   AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
JOIN filtered_return_catalog_dates d2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
JOIN catalog_sales ON sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk
                   AND sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk
JOIN filtered_return_catalog_dates d3 ON cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
GROUP BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name
ORDER BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Rewrite the query using explicit JOIN syntax instead of implicit joins in the WHERE clause to make the query structure clearer and help the optimizer with predicate pushdown.
Move the date filter conditions into the JOIN clauses to apply filters earlier in the execution process, potentially reducing the number of rows processed in joins.
Simplify the BETWEEN expression for month filters by directly specifying the range (4 AND 6) instead of using arithmetic (4 AND 4 + 2).
